name: Editorial Beauty Portrait

Y2K style beaded necklace with alternating white freshwater pearls and vibrant yellow smiley-face acrylic beads

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: An editorial beauty portrait of a young woman in her early-to-mid 20s with effortless chic style and clean girl aesthetic. She has long silky light brown hair with two thin intricate micro-braids framing her face, and stray strands catching the sunlight. She wears premium black acetate rectangular sunglasses with a glossy finish reflecting the outdoor sky, 18k thin gold hoop earrings with polished texture, and a Y2K style beaded necklace with alternating white freshwater pearls and vibrant yellow smiley-face acrylic beads. She sips an iced latte through a thin black straw from a transparent plastic cup showing swirling milk and espresso layers with cylindrical ice cubes and realistic condensation droplets. Shot from a low angle (worm's eye view) as an extreme close-up at a bright sun-drenched cafe terrace with a cream canvas patio umbrella overhead. Hard direct sunlight creates sharp highlights with natural bounce light on her jawline. Shot on 35mm lens at f/1.8 with shallow depth of field and creamy bokeh. No watermark. No artificial smoothing. Ultra-realistic skin with visible pores and natural moisture.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young woman early 20s sipping iced latte through straw at sunny outdoor cafe, clean girl aesthetic effortless chic, long silky light brown hair with micro-braids framing face, black acetate rectangular sunglasses reflecting sky, gold hoop earrings, Y2K beaded necklace with pearls and yellow smiley beads, transparent cup with swirling coffee layers and condensation, low-angle extreme close-up worm's eye view, cream patio umbrella overhead, hard sunlight with bounce light on jawline, 35mm f/1.8 shallow depth of field creamy bokeh, ultra-realistic skin visible pores natural moisture, not over-processed
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: An editorial beauty portrait captured from a low worm's eye angle of a stylish young woman sipping an iced latte at a sun-drenched outdoor cafe terrace. She has long silky light brown hair with two thin micro-braids framing her face and stray strands catching sunlight. She wears premium black acetate rectangular sunglasses reflecting the sky, 18k thin gold hoop earrings, and a Y2K beaded necklace with white pearls and yellow smiley-face beads. She holds a transparent plastic cup showing swirling milk and espresso layers with ice cubes and condensation droplets. A cream canvas patio umbrella spans the upper frame. Hard direct sunlight creates sharp highlights with natural bounce light on her jawline. Ultra-realistic skin with visible pores, subtle freckles, and natural moisture. Shallow depth of field with creamy bokeh.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the sunglasses from black rectangular to tortoiseshell round frames while keeping the same glossy finish and sky reflection. Preserve the jewelry, coffee cup, pose, and cafe setting.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Deeply nested props with item/details/physics for coffee cup
6_lighting_storytelling: 'hard direct sunlight softened by shade' = luxurious casual mood
